text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! Let me do another lap! I... I never want to
lose again!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
I feel the same way! Let's both do our absolute
best!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I'm still good to go! You can lay on a
heavier load too!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
If you're serious about winning, you have to pace
yourself. Let's spend a little more time getting
your body used to the current weight!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
(Each student squarely faces the challenges that
loom ahead, strenuously working themselves to
improve. What an inspiring display of grit and
spirit.)

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
(However much they strive for victory, they must
never forget their origins in their efforts.)

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Watching them, I'm reminded once more...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text: We're here for another game of darts. Especially since this time, we're gonna beat you, Sirius.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Please. You're all talk, and you know it.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume D
text_block_list.text: What?! That's sooo mean! You—oh...

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: "Oh"?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hello there, Sirius. How curious that we should
encounter one another after class.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Well, well. The Emperor's going outta her way to
come and greet me? Didn't know I was worthy.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
I don't have time to mess around exchanging
pleasantries though.
...Let's go, everyone.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text:
Oh, okay!
Well, um, excuse me!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...Very well.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume E
text_block_list.text:
I guess those rumors about Sirius and Rudolf being on
bad terms were true...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume F
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... There's something kinda, I don't know... sad
about it? Like, it's such a shame.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
("On bad terms," hm? When exactly did our
senseless spats begin, I wonder.)

text_block_list.name: Young Sirius
text_block_list.text:
That was awesome! Do that thing again, when you
stretched your arm out! ...It looked like a really
sharp sword! C'mon, let's dance more!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
(Perhaps it's because we've both found ourselves
something we can't afford to relinquish.)

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
(But now, the ever expanding rift between us...
Has it grown as vast as a universe?)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While walking down the hallway, I spot Symboli
Rudolf. She looks to be in low spirits...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...Sigh.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Oh, no, it's nothing substantial. I'm sorry for
concerning you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her answer does little to ease my concern, and it
appears she can tell. She forces a smile and
begins to explain.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...And that's that.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Her attitude and charisma have captivated many
of our students. Yet, it is my purpose as the
student council president to forge a path for
them to follow.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I expect that continued conflict between the two
of us will only place undue anxiety on everyone.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Neither one of us desires to see our vivacious
academy deteriorate into some locus of languor.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That said, improving our relationship will be no
small feat.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gazing at the sunset, Symboli Rudolf forces
another smile.
